headline: Sherwin-Williams Declares Dividend of $0.80 per Common Share
summary: The Board of Directors of The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) today announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share, payable on September 11, 2026, to shareholders of record on August 21, 2026.

headline: FCX to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Offing for the Stock?
summary: FCX heads into Q2 earnings with favorable copper price support offset by lower volumes and higher costs.
